mapper.select: SELECT * FROM parent ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM parent WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parent (user_id, name, phone, email, address) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address})
mapper.update: UPDATE parent SET user_id=#{userId}, name=#{name}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, address=#{address} WHERE id = #{id}
